pi.name: Professor Brian Sia Jia Xu
pi.title: Principal Investigator
pi.description: For research collaboration and academic inquiries

opportunities.title: PhD Positions
opportunities.description: We regularly accept PhD students with strong backgrounds in electrical engineering, physics, or related fields.

opportunities.title: Postdoctoral Positions
opportunities.description: Postdoc opportunities are available for researchers with expertise in photonics and integrated systems.

opportunities.title: Visiting Researchers
opportunities.description: We welcome visiting researchers and sabbatical visitors for collaborative projects.

additionalInfo.responseTime: We typically respond to inquiries within 2-3 business days. For urgent matters, please email Professor Xu directly.
additionalInfo.collaborationNote: For research collaboration proposals, please include relevant background information and preliminary ideas in your message. We're always interested in exploring new partnerships that advance photonic technologies.
